briefdescription.para: This function masks the KAT status based on KatOnConfig value when PDI type is partial pdi.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XilPdi instance
is the mask of the KAT that is going to run

listitem.para: Update RTC area before running KAT

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the xilpdi instance

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if setting SHA3 data context lost fails
Set the data context of previous SHA operation
Skip running the KAT for SHA3 if it is already run KAT will be run only when the CRYPTO_KAT_EN bits in eFUSE are set If KAT fails device will go into a secure lockdown state

briefdescription.para: This function updates the KAT status.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XilPdi instance
is the mask of the KAT that is going to run

briefdescription.para: This function performs KAT test on AES crypto Engine.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if setting AES data context lost fails
XLOADER_ERR_KAT_FAILED on AES DPACM or AES decrypt KAT failure
Update KAT status based on the user configuration
Set the data context of previous AES operation
Skip running the KAT for AES DPACM or AES if it is already run KAT will be run only when the CRYPTO_KAT_EN bits in eFUSE are set If KAT fails device will go into a secure lockdown state
Update KAT status in RTC area
Update KAT status based on the user configuration
Update KAT status in RTC area

briefdescription.para: This file contains KAT related functions.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
2.4 rpu 04/15/2026 First release
